title: Department of International Relations - About
content:
Department of International Relations - About

International Relations Office

As the International Relations Office, our primary duty is to ensure that our students from all over the world have access to the highest quality education and training services. The relevant applications made through our application system are evaluated by our experts. Our processes start from the students' first contact with our University and cover acceptance letters, visa support, final registration, university adaptation process and residence permit acquisition. In this way, all students who wish to receive higher education in Turkey are guided within the scope of the relevant legislation. In addition to international student admission processes, our office is responsible for the worldwide recognition and promotion of our University and the organization of relations with relevant organizations.

For Detailed Information:

https://international.uskudar.edu.tr/en

***

Erasmus Office

The Department of International Relations aims to create and increase opportunities for students to benefit from international exchange programs within the framework of Erasmus, Bilateral Exchange Agreements and other international exchange agreements.

It manages the processes related to communication and exchange programs with educational institutions, conducts the necessary correspondence with the partner universities, prepares, updates and follows the signature process of bilateral agreements so that students can study abroad and return without any problems. It ensures that foreign students are recruited to our University and hosted in our country without any problems.

For Detailed Information:

//erasmus.uskudar.edu.tr
